calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711. Telephone: 415-551-0333.

Francisco Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Esq.
Taren Brewer, Supportive Housing Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Elwin Damion Benjamin, sued as Elwin Benjamin.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on January 12, 2018.
Defendant's first amended answer was filed on January 31, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on February 21, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Elwin Damino Benjamin, sued as Elwin Benjamin, as follows:

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the property located at 74 6th Street, Room #501, San Francisco, CA 94103.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Taren Brewer.
Attorney Kaquiska Turner for the plaintiff.
Defendant Elwin Benjamin NOT is present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Mar-12-2018 remains on calendar. (501)
